description.content: Portfolio and account management operations

Retrieve a list of portfolios accessible to the authenticated client application. Returns portfolio identifiers, names, types, base currencies, and inception dates. Supports pagination for large portfolio sets.

description.content: Portfolio position and holdings operations

Retrieve current positions for a portfolio as of the specified date or in near real-time intraday. Returns security identifiers, quantities, market values, cost basis, unrealized gain/loss, and accrued income for each position.

description.content: Transaction history and settlement operations

Retrieve transaction history for a portfolio over a specified date range. Returns trade details, corporate actions, cash movements, income events, and settlement status. Supports filtering by transaction type and date range.

description.content: Performance measurement and attribution operations

Retrieve performance measurement and attribution data for a portfolio over a specified period. Returns time-weighted returns, money-weighted returns, and benchmark-relative performance. Supports daily and monthly calculation frequencies using industry-standard methodologies for all asset types.

description.content: Risk analytics and exposure operations

Retrieve risk analytics for a portfolio including value at risk (VaR), tracking error, beta, duration, convexity, and factor exposures. The TrueView risk analytics engine provides scenario analysis and stress testing capabilities for regulatory reporting and investment decision-making.

info.name: State Street Alpha Data Platform API

description.content:
The State Street Alpha Data Platform API provides institutional investment managers, asset owners, and wealth managers with programmatic access to their portfolio data across the front-to-back Alpha investment management platform. The API enables clients to retrieve portfolio positions, holdings, investable cash, pledged collateral, securities on loan, risk exposures, performance measurement, and transaction history in near real-time. Built on Snowflake and Microsoft Azure, the Alpha Data Platform provides intraday visibility across geographies, asset classes, and counterparties. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials (RFC 6749 Section 4.4.2). All requests require the X-Correlation-ID header for request tracing. The API follows REST conventions with JSON as the default data format, versioned using Major.Minor.Patch semantics.

Contact Support:
 Name: State Street API Support
 Email: api-support@statestreet.com
